# HubSpot
> HubSpot is a leading CRM platform with marketing, sales, and customer service software for growing businesses.

## Main Pages
- [CRM Platform](https://www.hubspot.com/products/crm)
- [Get Started Free](https://www.hubspot.com/get-started)

- [Sales Hub](https://www.hubspot.com/products/sales)
- [Service Hub](https://www.hubspot.com/products/service)
- [CMS Hub](https://www.hubspot.com/products/cms)
- [Operations Hub](https://www.hubspot.com/products/operations)
- [Commerce Hub](https://www.hubspot.com/products/commerce)

## Company

## Contact

- Email: contact@hubspot.com
llmstxt.generated_llmstxt_full:
# HubSpot
> HubSpot is a leading CRM platform with marketing, sales, and customer service software for growing businesses.

## Products & Services
- [Marketing Hub](https://www.hubspot.com/products/marketing): All-in-one marketing automation software including email, social, ads, and analytics.
- [Sales Hub](https://www.hubspot.com/products/sales): Sales CRM software with email tracking, meeting scheduling, and pipeline management.
- [Service Hub](https://www.hubspot.com/products/service): Customer service software with ticketing, knowledge base, and customer feedback tools.

## Contact
- Website: https://www.hubspot.com
- Email: contact@hubspot.com
